page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance configured with 12 vCPUs and 48.0 GB of system memory. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance utilizes a dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The CPU configuration features 12 physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead. The instance runs on the KVM hypervisor.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio provides a balanced resource allocation, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads that require dedicated CPU performance and moderate memory density without the premium associated with memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware classes.

With its dedicated physical cores and high clock speed, the ecs.hfg9i.3xlarge is suitable for multi-threaded applications, web serving, application servers, build systems, and general-purpose enterprise workloads. The lack of hyperthreading makes it particularly appropriate for tasks sensitive to resource sharing and CPU cache contention.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 12 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.4 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With a single thread per core, the instance avoids hyperthreading resource sharing. It is equipped with 48.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring dedicated compute performance and moderate memory, such as application servers, web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C vCPUs at 3.4 GHz, 48.0 GB of RAM, and a 10 Gbps network baseline under the KVM hypervisor.

tagline: A balanced virtual machine featuring dedicated physical cores, high clock speed, and a standard memory-to-CPU ratio for consistent compute performance.
bullet_points: 12 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 12 physical Intel Xeon cores
48.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at 3.4 GHz
KVM hypervisor virtualization with no local storage included
Suited for application servers, web serving, and build systems
